programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Child the Killer
programme.desc: Jeannette does everything she can to care for her son, Timmy; everything is going well until his dark side emerges, and he becomes violent and dangerous; despite every effort to help her son, she watches helplessly as he spirals into darkness.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: Hunters found Army veteran Maribel Ramos's body in a remote area, sparking a hunt for her killer; investigators uncovered a fatal dispute with her roommate over unpaid rent.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: A romantic date at a high school Valentine's dance turns into a night of terror when a teenager is abducted from her boyfriend's arms at gunpoint.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: American Detective
programme.desc: This true-crime series hosted by Lt. Joe Kenda, one of America's toughest detectives, features incredibly disturbing and mind-blowing cases from across the country. Lt. Kenda expertly guides us through the complex twists and turns of these bizarre crimes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old single mother Cheyenne Clough is brutally assaulted and left in a secluded park to die; as police investigate, they discover a trail of blind loyalty and deadly betrayal that may have led to her murder.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: A 33-year-old single mother, Lindsey Wilkins is found shot in the head by an apparent suicide, but when no gun is found, police suspect murder and uncover a trail of secrets and betrayals with a shocking twist puts the case in jeopardy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: A daughter receives an odd text from her mother's phone claiming she left town with a new man, which is the first clue that something is very wrong; the ensuing investigation uncovers more troubling evidence proving her worst fears have come true.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: Police uncover a trail of evidence that indicates that a missing young woman has been the victim of foul play.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: Police investigate the terrifying mystery behind the murder of two teenage girls; either they were victims of a targeted attack, or they had simply been in the wrong place at the wrong time.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: True Conviction
programme.desc: An upstate New York cab driver is shot dead in his car, and the entire area is dumbfounded as to who would kill a man known for his great generosity; a rapid-fire investigation uncovers a treacherous plot hatched in a salacious affair.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: True Conviction
programme.desc: Racetrack horse groom Leslie Dickenson is found dead in her dorm, and her death is ruled a suicide; her family balks, suspecting foul play, but it will face years of torment before a tip sends investigators on a 1,400-mile hunt for a killer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: True Conviction
programme.desc: Surveillance video captures the drive-by shooting of father Nicoh Mayhew; Nicoh's nephew is a prime suspect but has an airtight alibi -- he's in jail; crime scene video and jail calls uncover a murder plot that threatens the entire justice system.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Betrayed
programme.desc: Janet Chandler dreams of a life beyond the small Midwestern town where she grew up, but those dreams are cut short when she's betrayed in the most horrific way possible.

programme.title: Betrayed
programme.desc: In 1984, college student Angela Samota gets noticed by the wrong person leading to the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Betrayed
programme.desc: Unsuspecting 17-year-old Mary Jayne Jones moves to small town in Iowa and gets a job waiting tables; she makes the mistake of believing that there's good in everyone, and it will cost her her life.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: The building of a backyard shed destroys a yearslong, close relationship between two neighbors and ignites a vicious conflict that sees property destroyed, pets killed, and finally two people shot to death in cold blood.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Some grudges die hard, but this neighbor's won't die until his enemies do.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: Two women with a shared wall between their townhouses become increasingly volatile with each other; food fights, physical altercations and vandalism come to a bloody climax.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: In Harlem, N.Y., a couple discovers it's not better to have the upstairs apartment.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: They say fences make good neighbors, but sometimes they can make dead ones.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Decades after 16-year-old Molly Bish vanished, her sister turns to TikTok for answers.

programme.title: Hollywood Demons
programme.desc: Scams, lies, and sex tapes have tarnished the reputation of the '90s high school sitcom. Friends, parents, and actors divulge the harsh realities some cast members faced when the cameras stopped rolling.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Boy Band Confidential: A Hollywood Demons Event
programme.desc: Obsessed fans, an attempted kidnapping and a rumor of an illegitimate child are just a few of the setbacks *NSYNC, 98 Degrees and O-Town faced in their rise to teen idols. And one member reveals an arrest that has been kept hush-hush for years.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Decades after 16-year-old Molly Bish vanished, her sister turns to TikTok for answers.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: A single mother gets along with her handyman neighbor, until she gets a new man in her life and her neighbor adopts more than 50 dogs; accusations become threats, threats become attacks and, eventually, the conflict reaches a bloody conclusion.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor
programme.desc: A woman becomes the target of her overly flirtatious neighbor after her husband dies; the woman's brother moves in to protect her and is put on a collision course with the the neighbor that will be resolved with bloodshed.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID
programme.sub-title: Death at the Front Door - Who Shot Heidi Firkus?
programme.desc: Heidi Firkus calls 911 after her husband claims an intruder is breaking into their Minnesota home; Heidi ends up dead, and the case remains cold for 10 long years until a new investigator takes a fresh look.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID
programme.sub-title: Kristen Trickle Autopsy of the Mind
programme.desc: First responders find Kristen Trickle clinging to life and attempt CPR, but she does not survive; the coroner rules her death a suicide, but police and prosecutors are skeptical and charge her husband with murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours on ID
programme.desc: After her husband dies of an apparent overdose, Kouri Richins writes a children's book about grief; she's charged with his murder.

programme.title: Where Murder Lies
programme.desc: A ranch heir vanishes, and police find out whether blood is thicker than water.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Where Murder Lies
programme.desc: A pregnant woman goes missing, then reappears.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Where Murder Lies
programme.desc: A couple is ravaged by a crime so convoluted it nearly defies imagination.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A killer guns down a 46-year-old woman, and detectives discover that a fleeing Sheriff's Deputy is the assailant; less than 48 hours later, they arrest him and reveal an unrepentant psychopath capable of executing the love of his life in cold blood.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: After the murder of a successful executive one night in Connecticut, her case goes cold; four years later, a troubled man appears, ready to confess; investigators uncover this was no ordinary murder and that he's an impulsive psychopath.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: When a loving husband turns up murdered in his Loveland, Ohio home, the prime suspect is his troubled wife, who claims to have little recollection; detectives uncover her story is nothing but the manipulation of a vindictive person.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.sub-title: Make Sure You Get My Good Side
programme.desc: A road rage incident turns deadly as an elderly man is beaten to death by a teenager who claims he was acting in self-defense; detectives not only find holes in his story but uncover that he is a remorseless and manipulative psychopath.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A young man's confession to participating in a plot to murder another teenager stuns police in a small Florida town; detectives uncover a plot involving a manipulative ex-girlfriend and a young psychopath with the desire to kill.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: After the murder of a rural Virginia couple and the disappearance of their adult son, detectives wonder who could have acted with such rage; when the son resurfaces, investigators come face to face with a true psychopath.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: When missing dental assistant and mother Sharon Ray is found dead in a well, the town of Grand Rivers, Kentucky, joins together to find who did this; loved ones wonder if Sharon was living a lie when those closest to her become prime suspects.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: Tiffanie Adams is expecting her first child but disappears from her home in Sullivan, Ind.; as police search for answers, they stumble upon dark secrets surrounding the men in her life.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: When Robin Baxter is found dead floating in the Ohio River, the entire town of New Albany, Ind., bands together to find who's responsible; it takes over 20 years of crossing off suspects before an elusive clue cracks the case open.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: After a cattle rancher turns up dead in his trailer home, the minuscule town of Driscoll, North Dakota, points fingers at everyone in the small population; left with little evidence, it takes over a decade to hone in on his executioner.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: An inexperienced police department handles the tragic murder case of young mother Jessica Currin, leading to critical errors and false accusations; the case goes cold until Jessica's father protests the state of Kentucky to reinvestigate.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.sub-title: I Wanted My Father to Die
programme.desc: Teresa Holman spends much of her childhood wishing her father, Freddie Bowen, would die for the things he does to his family, but when presented with a chance to get her wish, the choice she makes has unforeseen consequences and leads to tragedy.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Child the Killer
programme.sub-title: The Child I Thought I Knew
programme.desc: A single mother overcoming addiction struggles to raise her son and daughter. Despite what appears to be a loving family and a sibling bond she could only hope for, she never could have foreseen the true monster that lies within her 13-year-old son.

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: A New Hampshire town reels after police arrest four teenagers for robbing and murdering a 42-year-old mother and maiming her 11-year-old daughter; detectives uncover two suspects with the characteristics of sadistic psychopaths.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Signs of a Psychopath
programme.desc: Investigators search a farm for a missing man and find a human leg bone on the property; the owner, Susan Monica, admits that her pigs ate her tenant alive, and he's not the only victim; Monica despises humans but loves her pigs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
